questions.question: 1.The freezing point of a pure solvent is_______________ that of a dilute solution of a solute in the solvent.
2.Colligative property of a solution depends on the?

answers.a: ratio of the number of solute particles to the number of solvent particles
answers.d: the molecular weight of the solute

questions.question: 3.The correct relation between depression of freezing point and molality is?
5.The definition of molality for a solution is ?

answers.a: Number of moles of solute dissolved in 1 Kg of the solvent
answers.b: Number of moles of solute dissolved in 1 litre of the solvent
answers.c: Number of gram equivalent of solute dissolved in 1 litre of the solvent
answers.d: Number of grams of solute dissolved in 1 kg of solvent
